idea-plugin.name: OpenRouter
idea-plugin.description:
OpenRouter IntelliJ Plugin - Comprehensive integration with OpenRouter.ai for accessing 400+ AI models with advanced usage monitoring, quota tracking, OAuth/PKCE authentication, and AI Assistant proxy support.

Key Features

  • 🔐 OAuth/PKCE Authentication - Secure authentication flow with automatic API key generation
  • 🚀 AI Assistant Proxy - Local OpenAI-compatible proxy to connect JetBrains AI Assistant with OpenRouter's 400+ models
  • 📊 Interactive Status Bar Widget - Real-time usage display with comprehensive popup menu
  • 🔑 Advanced API Key Management - Secure provisioning key support with scope-aware validation
  • 📈 Detailed Usage Analytics - Track token consumption, costs, and model performance
  • ⭐ Favorite Models - Quick access to your preferred AI models
  • 🔄 Dynamic Plugin Support - Install, update, and uninstall without IDE restart
  • 🎯 Real-time Monitoring - Live connection status with color-coded indicators

Quick Start

  1. Install the plugin (no restart required!)
  2. Use OAuth/PKCE flow or manually add your Provisioning Key from OpenRouter
  3. Configure in Settings → Tools → OpenRouter
  4. Click the status bar widget to access all features
  5. (Optional) Configure AI Assistant to use OpenRouter via custom server - Setup Guide

Perfect For

  • Developers using AI models for code assistance via AI Assistant
  • Teams monitoring AI usage and costs across multiple models
  • Anyone wanting secure access to 400+ AI models from 40+ providers

This is an unofficial plugin and is not affiliated with OpenRouter.ai or JetBrains.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
🎉 Version 0.5.0 - Chat Tool Window & Enhanced Security (2026-03-19)

💬 New Chat Tool Window:

  • Multi-Chat Support - Create, switch, and delete multiple chat sessions in IDE sidebar
  • Persistent Storage - Chat history saved locally with model preferences
  • Token Tracking - Real-time token estimation and cumulative counts
  • Smart Titles - Auto-generated from first message
  • Keyboard Shortcuts - Enter to send, Cmd/Ctrl+Enter for newline

🔐 Security & Storage:

  • OS-Native Key Storage - Keychain (macOS), Credential Manager (Windows), libsecret (Linux)
  • Automatic Migration - Legacy keys seamlessly migrated to secure storage
  • CVE Fixes - Patched Okio (CVE-2023-3635) and JUnit (CVE-2020-15250) vulnerabilities

📊 Improved Statistics:

  • Shared Stats Cache - Consistent data across status bar, popup, and tool window
  • Real-Time Cost Tracking - Accurate "Today" stats with local tracking
  • Days Remaining - Estimate based on yesterday's spending

🔧 Bug Fixes:

  • Duplicate API Keys - Fixed handling of multiple IntelliJ API keys
  • Thread Safety - EDT compliance with in-memory caching
  • Jetty 12 Migration - Updated from Jetty 11 to 12

Full Changelog

Version 0.4.2 - Multimodal Support (2026-01-20)

Improvements:

  • Multimodal Support - Added support for image, audio, and video content with AI models
  • Test Coverage - Added automated tests for multimodal capabilities

🎉 Version 0.3.0 - Enhanced User Experience (2025-12-05)

New Features:

  • 👋 Setup Wizard - Interactive onboarding dialog for first-time users
  • 🔍 Advanced Model Filtering - Filter models by provider, context window, and capabilities
  • 📊 Modal Statistics Dialog - Enhanced statistics popup with proper modal behavior

Quality & Stability:

  • 300+ Tests - Comprehensive test coverage with 100+ new tests
  • Bug Fixes - Crash prevention and improved dialog behavior
  • IDE 2025.3.X Support - Extended compatibility for Rider and other IDEs up to 2025.3+
  • Enhanced Error Handling - Better network error recovery and user feedback

AI Assistant Setup Guide | Full Changelog

🎉 Version 0.2.1 - OpenRouter models support for 3rd-party AI Assistants (2025-10-04)

  • fix: resolve JetBrains plugin verifier compatibility issues and optimize workflows

🎉 Version 0.2.0 - OpenRouter models support for 3rd-party AI Assistants (2025-10-03)

New Features:

  • 🤖 AI Assistant Proxy - Local OpenAI-compatible proxy server to connect JetBrains AI Assistant with OpenRouter's 400+ models
  • ⭐ Favorite Models - Manage and organize your preferred AI models
  • 🌐 Custom Server Support - Configure AI Assistant to use OpenRouter via custom model connection

Improvements:

  • 207+ Tests - Comprehensive test coverage with 100% pass rate
  • Zero Critical Code Smells - Enhanced code quality and maintainability
  • Better Performance - API key caching and optimized request handling
  • Modern UI - Updated to IntelliJ UI DSL v2

AI Assistant Setup Guide | Full Changelog

Version 0.1.0 - Initial Release (2025-09-18)

First beta release of the OpenRouter IntelliJ Plugin with comprehensive OpenRouter.ai integration.

Key Features:

  • Interactive Status Bar Widget - Real-time usage display with comprehensive popup menu
  • Advanced API Key Management - Provisioning key support with automatic API key creation
  • Detailed Usage Analytics - Track token consumption, costs, and model performance
  • Smart Settings Panel - Configuration with validation and testing
  • Statistics Popup - Modal dialog with comprehensive usage analytics
  • Multi-IDE Support - Works across all JetBrains IDEs (2023.2+)

Technical Highlights:

  • Secure credential storage using IntelliJ's built-in storage
  • Asynchronous API operations for smooth user experience
  • Comprehensive error handling and user feedback
  • 22 passing tests ensuring reliability
